narrative:
Darke County has 33,816 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.9 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.5% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -17.7% D−R vs -37.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
